//: Copy this file to config.local.json (gitignored) and edit for your machine.
//python: Python 3.11+ with the packages from requirements.txt; used by start-testy.bat. Omit to use 'python' from PATH.
//corpus: Default PSDs for a run: either corpus_file (a text file, one .psd/.psb path per line, absolute or repo-relative, # comments allowed) or corpus_dir (every .psd/.psb directly in that directory). corpus_file wins if both are set. If neither is set, local-test-fixtures/psd in the repo is scanned when it exists.
//editors: Optional explicit editor paths; omit entries to use the built-in discovery (standard install locations).
//build_command: Shell command (run via 'cmd /s /c') that refreshes the Patchy release build before a run; omit to skip rebuilding when no command fits your setup.
